title: Wound
description: Bring part of back 4 blood to minecraft.
body:
# Wound
### Wound system
When a player is hurt, it will cause wound to the player, which is difficult to recover, and will reduce the player's maximum health.  
  
### Wound Resistance
When the player eats the golden apple, it will provide the player with the effect of wound resistance.   
Each level of wound resistance will make the player suffer - 10% of the wound.
  
### Heavy Shield
Add a heavy shield to resist more than 20 points of damage, and this damage will not cause wound to the player.
  
### Configurable
- Max wound, Wound heal speed;
- Wound resistance of players under different difficulties;
- Which damage sources can cause wound.

### CraftTweaker
You can use CraftTweaker to get or modify the player's wound, and you can also add wound resistance to the player (superimposed with difficulty wound resistance and effect)
